prompt: 문 상태머신: closed + open → opened, opened + close → closed, opened + lock → opened (변화 없음). (transition "closed" "open") → "opened".
reference_solution:
(defn transition [s e] (cond [(and (= s "closed") (= e "open")) "opened"] [(and (= s "opened") (= e "close")) "closed"] [true s]))
(println (transition "closed" "open"))
